title: Make cache-control the caching contract
description: Set explicit Cache-Control and surrogate headers on every response so edge caching is deterministic, not accidental.
body: Use when serving any response through a CDN. Do not rely on default heuristic caching — without explicit headers the edge guesses, leading to either no caching or stale private data cached publicly. Actions: set Cache-Control (max-age, s-maxage, private/public) and surrogate keys per response class, inspect the response headers at the edge, and separate cacheable static from per-user dynamic. Validation signals include the CDN reporting HIT/MISS as intended and no private response cached publicly. Risk boundary: caching an authenticated response publicly leaks user data — treat any public-cache of private content as a blocking defect requiring escalation.
